Understanding Business Manager
Understanding Business Manager
Understanding Business
Manager
If you are running ads on behalf of clients, you'll need to be accessing their ad account
and page through Business Manager - a tool that allows you to manage all client
assets in one place (and with just one login). In these sections, you'll learn what
Business Manager is, and how to access client accounts.
Business Manager allows you to easily manage all of your client accounts under one
hub and to provide access to various members of your team without ever having to
exchange passwords.
Key points:
Business Manager uses a separate link to Facebook: business.facebook.com
You need a personal Facebook account to create a Business Manager (but this
won't show inside the Business Manager)
You can add team members or contractors using their work email (instead of
their personal profiles)
Usually, new Business Managers have a limit of 2-5 ad accounts, you need to
request to increase this
Each person can only set up a maximum of 2 Business Managers
